# v80 — Chicks on fire

![](https://lh7-qw.googleusercontent.com/docsz/AD_4nXc0a72bTrXBx67PN1W3ULv1vBLUdTNv_Can7EPyQwms7AYwbk-8TW3RTP9XAMtz_yxaP9Si9-tyTKXo3A2lMCwW0N5sz9lR-MwVYoIjcJsyMKF0_oKSmbYg8pB9U-co7z4pT2XMsG5FpsPG1WMVJC0ko6dY?key=chRXiLUrI54Os_fCIQ1Z3w)

## Features

* Agent and instance wildcards
* Resizable textarea when used as single input item
* RAG AI Vector DB using chroma and supporting CRUD operations
* RAG AI with source indication
* Single executable, but multi-host capable edge connectors using auto-generated and cached ids
* SQL Database available as edge connector

## Fixes

* Event-handling under same user/identity tab-duplication
* Long deployment times when lots of data are already accumulated
* Expensive internal re-renders of the media server files available
